name: ng-slider
title: Slider (Angular)
description: Range slider built on Spartan-ng brain Slider - single value with step + min/max. Use for continuous values (volume, opacity, price range). Mirrors React Slider from @gremorie/rx-forms.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-slider.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
